description: You are a robotics engineer. Two of your teammates have been working on parallel feature branches: 'feature/sensor-upgrade' (IMU sensor fusion) and 'feature/pid-tuning' (motor control). Resolve the Git merge conflicts in the /home/ga/workspace/robocontrol/ repository resulting from merging 'feature/pid-tuning' into 'feature/sensor-upgrade'. Integrate the functionality from both branches, ensuring Python files have no syntax errors, YAML is valid, and all documentation is maintained. Commit the resolved merge.
